name: Five-Alarm Beef Chili (Crockpot)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup vegetable oil or olive oil
4 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into pieces
1 4 oz can chopped jalapenos or mild chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the beef and brown on all sides, turning as needed to ensure even browning.
3. Transfer the browned beef to the Crock-Pot.
4. In the same skillet, add the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil and sauté the onions and green peppers until soft.
5. Transfer the sautéed vegetables to the Crock-Pot.
6. Stir in the jalapenos, chili powder, oregano, cumin, salt, and beer into the Crock-Pot.
7. Cover the Crock-Pot and cook on LOW for 6 to 8 hours or on HIGH for 3 to 4 hours.
8. Serve hot.
